id: become aware of the power of AI
intention: 逐渐意识到 AI 的力量或影响
naturalChunk: become aware of the power of AI
avoidSaying: awareness of the powers of the AI
sentencePatterns: I am gradually becoming aware of ...
People are becoming more aware of ...
realLifeExamples: I am gradually becoming aware of the power of AI.
More people are becoming aware of the power of AI in education.
usageNotes: 当你想表达“慢慢意识到”时，用 become aware of 很自然。awareness 更常作名词，放在 build awareness of, raise awareness of 这类结构里。
productionPrompts: 用 I am gradually becoming aware of ... 造一句和学习、工作或 AI 有关的英文句子。
